Hey Cerberus! Based on the last feedback, I want to test a revised idea and would love Stage 1 feedback.

Project: ChainMood — a blockchain-powered mood-board agent for trusted emotional journaling.

Users send journal entries, and the agent creates daily mood summaries and visual prompts. The project uses blockchain for trust and transparency, so users can feel confident that their mood journey is recorded fairly.

Track: Social

Why it's needed: Existing mood apps are centralized and opaque; ChainMood brings transparency to personal emotional tracking.

Would love your feedback!
